_meta.description: Grant-engine subnetwork access matrix — grant-engine-specific surfaces only
_meta.note: Defines access rules for grant-engine surfaces only. Core NEXIS surfaces are governed by NEXIS_AI_CORE/identity/permissions/registry/master-access-matrix.json

EXECUTIVE_CORE.description: Founder sovereign — full access to all surfaces

ADMIN_OPERATIONS.description: Grant strategist and program leads — manage pipeline and proposals

STAFF_SPECIALIST.description: Reviewers and ops assistants — read pipeline, limited writes

MEMBER.description: Standard authenticated user — member-facing surfaces only

GRANT_OPPORTUNITIES.description: Opportunity discovery, search, scoring, and management

GRANT_PROJECTS.description: Project profiles, grant matching, architect conversations

GRANT_AGENTS.description: Agent invocation — single-agent and pipeline runs

GRANT_NEXIS_CHAT.description: NEXIS AI chat interface and agent API

GRANT_SCORING.description: Opportunity scoring — read and write. Internal weights never exposed to MEMBER tier.
GRANT_SCORING.hard_rule: Internal scoring weights (strategic_fit_score, eligibility_score, readiness_score, award_value_score, urgency_score) must never be surfaced in member-facing output

hard_limits.no_eligibility_determinations: System guides; humans decide eligibility. No route may return a definitive eligibility determination.
hard_limits.no_pipeline_mutation_by_member: MEMBER tier routes are read-only. No pipeline data modification by member-facing routes.
hard_limits.no_scoring_weight_disclosure: Internal scoring weights are never exposed to MEMBER tier in any response.
hard_limits.pipeline_status_informational_only: Pipeline stage labels must be workflow stages only — never confidence signals or outcome predictions.
